PADEL
PCI · Casa De Padel, Kharadi · Pune

Casa De Padel.
Late Evening.

A private padel subscription for intermediate and above players in Kharadi, Pune. Two courts. Two 90-minute sessions per evening. Five nights a week. Somewhere between 8 PM and midnight, based on who's playing that day.

Venue Casa De Padel
Time 8 PM – Midnight
Days Mon – Fri
Spots 24
Sound familiar?
₹450/hr per person. Every time you play.
₹212/hr. New balls and chilled water included. Save ₹9,724/month.
Courts unavailable. Booked. Wrong time. Wrong day.
Two courts. Every weeknight. Flexible time. Ours.
Chasing 3 people just to confirm a game
Your spot is always confirmed.
Different strangers every session. Zero chemistry.
Same crew. Real partnerships. Better padel.
Showing up to play with someone who can't rally
Everyone here can actually play.
Dead, flat balls that kill the game before it starts
Always fresh tournament-grade balls.
Hunting for water. Dispenser. Five-minute walk. Paying per bottle.
Free cold bottles waiting at the court.
What this is

Consistent courts.
Consistent people.
Consistent game.

Two courts at Casa De Padel. Every Monday to Friday.
Match time is flexible between 8 PM and midnight, decided each day based on who's playing.

Your spot is reserved. You show up, you play.

Two 90-minute sessions per evening.
12 to 16 players per session. Total membership of 24.
Competitive enough to keep you sharp. Small enough that everyone knows everyone.

How it works
01
Register for the day
Members register for each evening on the Reclub private group: one tap, done. See who else is confirmed before you leave home. Each session runs with 12 to 16 players across both courts.
02
Show up and play
Courts are ready at your session time. Matches are organised on the night by the Day Leader. You play 90 minutes per session. Two sessions run back to back across both courts.
03
Play more when you can
When other members don't register, available slots open up. The more consistent you are, the more court time you get.
What's included
Tournament-Grade Balls
Replaced every 3 to 4 hours of play.
Experts recommend changing after 8 to 9.
You always play with balls that have bounce.
Bottled Mineral Water
Waiting at the courts every session.
Nothing to sort. Nothing to pay for.
Two Dedicated Courts
Both courts. Every weeknight.
No sharing. No waiting. No guessing.
Organised Play
A Day Leader handles scheduling and rotations.
You just bring your racket.
Consistency & Club Feel
Same competitive players every week.
You know who you're playing with. Your game improves faster.
Tournaments & Social Events
Internal tournaments seeded by your leaderboard ranking.
Once a month, the group gets together off the court.
Game Footage
Professional cameras on every court.
Watch sessions back. Track improvement.
Share your best shots straight to social media.
Welcome Kit
A curated set of personalised PCI goodies.
Sent to every new member when they join.
What we play
Format
Americano
Rotating partners. Everyone plays with everyone.
Points-based. Competitive. Social.
Format
Mexicano
Paired with and against players at your level.
Scores update in real time. Always competitive.
Format
Spontaneous Tournaments
Fixed teams. Bracket play. Bragging rights.
Called on the night when the energy demands it.
Session
Drills & Practice
Serve patterns, wall play, volleys, lobs.
Structured improvement. Not just match play.
Format
Open Doubles
Pick your partner. Challenge any pair.
Classic padel. On your terms.
Wildcard
Whatever the Night Calls For
Sometimes the group decides.
Format flexes around who shows up.
Leaderboard

Every point.
On record.

Most sports have no memory.
You play, you leave, nothing is logged.

At PCI, every game is recorded.
Every score. Every format. Every session.

You build a ranking that travels with you.
Group to venue. Venue to city. City to India.

Scores per format
Americano, Mexicano, Tournament.
Each format tracked by its own rules.
Points calculated correctly for every game type.
Full history
Every game you've ever played at PCI is on record.
Best runs, win streaks, improvement over time.
All retrievable. Forever.
Tournament seeding
Your leaderboard position determines your tournament seeding.
Consistent play earns you the matchups you deserve.

PCI App · Coming Soon

Scores, rankings, and match history are just the start.
The PCI App brings the whole community into one place - group chat, announcements, events, session galleries, and your personal record.
Founding members get early access.

Membership
July 2026 · Founding Batch

Choose your commitment.

Everything included. Courts, balls, mineral water, tournaments, monthly social events and a welcome kit. The longer you commit, the better the rate.

Monthly
₹10,000/mo
Total ₹10,000
Full flexibility. Spot not guaranteed for the following month. Someone on a longer plan can take it.
Most popular
3 Months
₹9,000/mo
Total ₹27,000
Spot secured for the full quarter. Best entry point for new subscribers.
6 Months
₹8,000/mo
Total ₹48,000
Half-year commitment. Spot locked, continuity guaranteed, better rate.
Best value
Annual
₹6,000/mo
Total ₹72,000
Your spot for the full year. The strongest signal you are serious and the sharpest rate.

Longer plans lock your spot for the full duration. Monthly members may lose their spot if someone on a longer plan joins.

Optional add-on
Coaching Add-on · ₹5,000/month
Get better, faster.

20 min 1-on-1 with your coach every week.
They review your game footage, spot patterns, work with you on court.
Targeted. Based on what your game actually needs.

2 hours of coached group drills every weekend.
Serve patterns, positioning, wall play, volleys.
Max 6 members per coach.

Non-refundable once a month has begun. Missed 1-on-1 slots do not carry over. Cancel before the next billing month.
The app
Reclub logo

Everything runs
through Reclub.

No WhatsApp chaos.
No manual sign-up sheets.
No "what time tonight?" an hour before.

One app. Everything in one place.

Private group · Subscribers only
Register in one tap
See who's confirmed. No chasing. No chat confirmations.
Vote on the format
Group votes. Day Leader locks it in. No debates on the night.
Team draws & pairings
Fair. Random. No awkward picking. No same pairs every night.
Stats & history
Sessions played, wins, partners. Your record, growing over time.
Community chat
Talk game, share clips. Not buried in a family WhatsApp group.
Live leaderboards
Scores update as you play. Standings live during Americanos and Mexicanos.
The venue

Casa De Padel
at Playshire.

Upper Kharadi Road, Kharadi, Pune

Playshire is one of Kharadi's best multi-sport complexes. A proper sports destination, not just a court booking. Casa De Padel sits inside it, which means you're playing in a facility built for people who take sport seriously. Rated 4.7 on Playo, open 24x7, and located in the heart of Kharadi's tech and residential corridor. Easy to get to after work, easy to stick to as a routine. Two great cafes at the venue make it easy to wind down after a session.

Padel Badminton Football Box Cricket Snooker / Pool
Who this is for

Players who are serious
about getting better.

  • Intermediate and above: you know your shots, you understand positioning, and you want competitive rallies, not beginner-friendly ones.
  • Consistent: you plan to show up most weeks, not occasionally. The club's quality depends on regular faces.
  • Done with logistics: you're tired of booking courts, chasing four people to confirm, or paying full walk-in rates.
  • Free most weeknights: you can make an evening session in Kharadi between 8 PM and midnight, Monday to Friday.
The rules
🚩
Cancel 6+ hours before or don't register
2+ late cancellations a month risks termination
🚩
Intermediate level and above only
You may be assessed before joining
🚩
Bring your own racket
Rentals available at the venue if needed
🚩
Guests only when numbers are short
Or if all players that night agree. Day Leader decides.
🚩
Hard cap of 24 members
Waitlist only once full. Spots open when someone leaves.

Full payment terms, refund policy, and subscription guidelines. Read the T&C →

hunting for courts?

Spots are extremely limited. Apply for an invite, we'll be in touch.
